verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who could ever believe that Mary a Virgin Would ever conceive and bring forth Messiah Who could ever tell Elisabeth her cousin Would be the mother to Christ's forerunner

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Although many forces came and stood in the way They could never never stop God's Program Always in opposition in what the Creator declares Gross darkness stands intimidating

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And It comes to hide away Then tries to Brush off Even denying the process of creation But who can stand in the way Of the great SON When He begins to shine on a new dawn The very spoken word by the Mighty Angel Will put on flesh and will become material Here I am standing against the odds Here I am the word made flesh against the odds Here I am the Masterpiece

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: (Thank you Lord) against the odds Here I am God in flesh again against the odds Here I am a Living epistle against the odds To prove that God's word can never fail no no no no To prove that God's word will come to pass Gross darkness stands intimidating

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Who could ever believe that Abraham an old man Would see his body changed into a young man Who could ever tell that Sarah who did laugh Would receive strength to bring forth the promised son Although all surrounding nations were plundged in great sin They could never, never stop God's program Always in opposition in what the Creator declares

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And It comes to hide away And it Then tries to Brush off Even denying the process of creation But who can stand in the way Of the great SON When He begins to shine on a new dawn The very spoken word by the Mighty Angel Will put on flesh and in you become material So here we are standing standing against the odds Here we are the word made flesh against the odds

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And Here we are the Masterpiece (thank you lord) against the odds God in flesh again against the odds Here we are living epistles against the odds To prove that God's word can never fail To prove that God's word has come to pass

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Who could ever believe that Mrs. Jesus Would stand so tall and so beautiful Who could ever tell this Bride of Christ Would finally understand, who she really is Even though the whole of Hell Comes up on this earth to fight They would never never stop God's program Always in opposition in what the Creator declares Gross darkness stands intimidating

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And It comes to hide away And then it tries to Brush off Even denying the process of creation But who can stand - in the way Of the great SON When He begins to shine on a new dawn The very spoken word by the Mighty Angel Has put on flesh and in you become material And here I am standing standing - against the odds Here I am the word made flesh - against the odds

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Here I am the Masterpiece (thank you Lord) against the odds God in flesh again - against the odds Here I am a Living epistle - against the odds To prove that God's word can never fail To prove that God's word will come to pass
